label: Convolution & local filters

node.label: Convolution & local filters
node.definition: Shared local kernels exploit translation structure and efficiently aggregate nearby information.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Convolution & local filters is to connect Signal processing & harmonic analysis, Images, video & spatial grids to downstream capabilities including Pooling & local aggregation, Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling, Convolutional neural networks.
examples: substrate for Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Signal processing & harmonic analysis, Images, video & spatial grids.

dependencies.rationale: Convolution & local filters uses Signal processing & harmonic analysis as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Convolution & local filters uses Images, video & spatial grids as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Convolution & local filters uses Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
